name: Vilepawn Archfiend
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, you must pay 500 LP (this is not optional), or this card is destroyed. When resolving an opponent's card effect that targets this card, roll a six-sided die and negate that effect if you roll a 3, and if you do, destroy that card. Your opponent's monsters cannot attack any "Archfiend" monsters you control, except "Vilepawn Archfiend".
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, you must pay 500 LP (this is not optional), or this card is destroyed. When resolving an opponent's card effect that targets this card, roll a six-sided die and negate that effect if you roll a 3, and if you do, destroy that card. Your opponent's monsters cannot attack any "Archfiend" monsters you control, except "Vilepawn Archfiend".

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
